headline: If Spider-Man Wins 2026’s Box Office Crown, These Stocks Win Too
summary: Prediction market traders have a clear favorite for 2026’s box office crown, and the ripple effects extend well beyond Hollywood. On Polymarket’s “Highest grossing movie in 2026?” market, Spider-Man: Brand New Day commands a 54.5% implied probability of finishing the year on top, comfortably ahead of Avengers: Doomsday at 19.5% and Toy Story 5 at ... If Spider-Man Wins 2026’s Box Office Crown, These Stocks Win Too

headline: KnowBe4 Launches a New Family Hub Providing Cyber Safety Training for Children and Adults
summary: TAMPA BAY, Fla., May 29, 2026--KnowBe4, the global leader in digital workforce security, securing both AI agents and humans, today announced the launch of ‘CAPY: Cyber Awareness Program for You’ - a new, one-stop, free online hub providing cybersecurity training for the entire family.

headline: Netflix Buys Affleck AI Startup InterPositive To Reshape Content Economics
summary: Netflix, ticker NasdaqGS:NFLX, has acquired Ben Affleck's AI startup InterPositive. The deal brings InterPositive's proprietary AI tools into Netflix's content production pipeline. InterPositive's technology is intended to automate parts of filmmaking, including visual effects and background actor work. Ben Affleck will stay involved as a senior adviser, with the full InterPositive team joining Netflix. For investors tracking streaming and media, this move sits at the crossroads of...
